testcase.name: testMultipleTopics

Total subscribers: 1 17:52:09.258 [main] DEBUG org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Publishing message to topic 'topic1': 1 subscribers 17:52:09.259 [main] DEBUG org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Publishing message to topic 'topic2': 1 subscribers 17:52:09.261 [main] INFO org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Shutting down message bus

testcase.name: testHandlerException
testcase.system-out: 17:52:09.492 [main] INFO org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- InMemoryMessageBus started 17:52:09.493 [main] INFO org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- New subscription to topic 'test-topic'. Total subscribers: 1 17:52:09.493 [main] INFO org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- New subscription to topic 'test-topic'. Total subscribers: 2 17:52:09.494 [main] DEBUG org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Publishing message to topic 'test-topic': 2 subscribers 17:52:09.495 [main] INFO org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Shutting down message bus 17:52:09.494 [message-bus-dispatcher] ERROR org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus -- Error delivering message to subscriber on topic 'test-topic' java.lang.RuntimeException: Handler error at org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBusTest.lambda$testHandlerException$7(InMemoryMessageBusTest.java:191) at org.flossware.jeventbus.InMemoryMessageBus.lambda$publish$1(InMemoryMessageBus.java:106) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583)
